description_long: This beach chair features a classic wooden construction with a slatted seat and backrest, providing both durability and ventilation. The backrest is adorned with decorative vertical slats and a central cut-out design, adding a touch of elegance. Both sides of the chair are equipped with gently curved armrests for comfort and support. The legs are sturdy and slightly curved, enhancing stability and style. The overall design is open and inviting, suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks or promenades. The finish appears smooth and uniform, with no visible upholstery or cushioning.
description: A classic wooden beach chair with a slatted seat, decorative backrest, and curved armrests, finished in a smooth, uniform color.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the slatted seat, the armrest, and the vertical slats of the backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the decorative backrest with a central cut-out and the full width of the seat and armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, showing the armrest and slatted seat from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the decorative backrest and the structure of the rear legs.
